model.label: MiMo-V2-Pro
model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Kansas is the clear favorite with a KenPom rank of 21 and elite defensive efficiency (rank 10), while California Baptist lacks comparable analytical ratings and plays in the weaker WAC conference. The Jayhawks' experience in the Big 12 and superior talent should overwhelm the Lancers, despite California Baptist's solid defensive metrics (PA/G 67.6, 33rd nationally). While California Baptist has a high-scoring guard in Dominique Daniels Jr., Kansas's overall depth and tournament pedigree make a 4/13 upset unlikely.

reasoningStep.title: Kansas vs California Baptist Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Kansas holds significant advantages in team quality, conference strength, and tournament experience, making them heavy favorites against a California Baptist team that lacks elite analytical ratings.
reasoningStep.evidence: Kansas has KenPom rank 21, Torvik rank 22, with elite defense (rank 10) and solid offense (rank 57). California Baptist has no KenPom/Torvik ratings, but sports-reference shows SRS 2.52 (132nd), ORtg 107.1 (236th), DRtg 99.1 (31st). ESPN Analytics gives Kansas 92.6% win probability with a -14.5 spread. California Baptist's 25-8 record came against weak WAC schedule (SOS -2.94, 213rd). Kansas's 23-10 record came against Big 12 competition, providing better tournament preparation.
